_note: Maps task kind → (tool, role) for Claude Code. Advisory, read by hooks/external tooling to suggest routing. JSON (no yaml dep).

codebase_question.note: Specific, bounded, read-only question about the codebase.

bounded_implementation.note: Disjoint write scope, worktree-first for safety.

independent_review.note: Regression scan; does not patch the reviewed scope.

docs_lookup.note: Public docs, cited research. Prefer over browser session.

library_api_lookup.note: SDK/framework API queries. Pin by library id first.

browser_qa.note: DOM-aware web UI validation. Install Chrome extension first.

gui_blocked_or_auth_heavy.note: Only when browser and terminal are insufficient.

recurring_followup.note: Self-paced continuation. Or use anthropic-skills:schedule for cron.

long_task_continuity.note: Task spanning multiple days. Pairs with Automation-Intent.md.

claude_feature_question.note: Questions about Claude Code CLI, SDK, or API.

emergency_fallback.note: When Claude is stuck. Second-opinion / rescue path only.
